# Mirage Blog

## Docs

- [Posts](/pr-preview/pr-16/posts)
- [Introducing Azoth: A Deterministic EVM Bytecode Obfuscator](/pr-preview/pr-16/posts/introducing-azoth): We're excited to introduce Azoth, an open-source EVM bytecode obfuscator. It preserves contract logic while dissolving recognizable patterns, making reverse engineering at scale costly and impractical.
- [Introducing Mirage](/pr-preview/pr-16/posts/introducing-mirage): Mirage: the bet on flexible, Ethereum-native stablecoin privacy.
- [Mirage Researcher Grants for Independent Privacy Research](/pr-preview/pr-16/posts/mirage-researcher-grants): Privacy infrastructure only earns trust when its claims hold up under independent scrutiny. Mirage Researcher Grants fund external researchers to test those claims directly.
